title: mcaic-forge
description: This modest creation is a casual endeavor, serving as a Minecraft mod for the game AliceInCradle.
body:
This modest creation is a casual endeavor, serving as a Minecraft mod for the game AliceInCradle.

 

Please do not insult me. I used 'I have a disability that prevents me from using a computer, and my parents don't know how to code, so I use mcreator' as an example.

 

Creating this Forge mod was a temporary interest, but unfortunately, I haven't mastered the Java language, so I had to resort to using mcreator. Of course, if I have the energy to maintain this project until I enter college, by that time, I should have a decent command of Java and won't need to rely on mcreator anymore. However, there's a high probability that I'll refactor it at that point.

 

"In brief, the creation of this mod stemmed from my design of a skin for Noelle. On a whim, I decided to go a step further and bring this character's weapon back into the game. That's how this mod came to be. Currently, the mod features the character's exclusive weapon—a staff with a purple crystal, for which I crafted the model myself. I'm still in the process of trying to incorporate the remaining elements into this mod."

屑作，随便做做，算是游戏AliceInCradle的mc模组。

请不要骂我，否则我拿“我有残疾无法使用电脑，我的父母不会编程，所以用mcreator”来举例了

做这个forge模组是临时兴趣，但奈何没有掌握Java语言，只能使用mcreator。当然如果我有精力将这个项目维护到我上大学的话，那个时候就差不多掌握Java语言了，就可以不依赖mcreator了。不过到时候大概率会重构它。

简要说明，做这个模组是因为我绘制了一个诺艾儿的皮肤，然后突发奇想不如把这个角色的武器也还原到游戏中吧。然后就做了这个模组。目前在该模组中有该角色的专属武器——带有紫色水晶的法杖，它的模型由我自己完成的。剩下的东西还在试图更新到此模组中...

 

code:https://github.com/PonderFox0643/mcaic

website：https://www.aicmod.top/
